issue_summary: ClassUtils now throws `IllegalArgumentException` when array is greater than JVM spec limit (255)
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Converts a class name to a JLS style class name.
     *
     * @param className the class name
     * @return the converted name
     * @throws NullPointerException if the className is null
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Converts a class name to a JLS style class name.
     *
     * @param className the class name.
     * @return the converted name.
     * @throws NullPointerException if the className is null.
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException Thrown if the class name represents an array with more dimensions than the JVM supports, 255.
     */
